js.home: const base=env.get("baseUrl");const $=utils.kitty.load(await(0,utils.req)(base));const cards=$(".module-main,.module-items,.tab-list").toArray().map(block=>{const title=$(block).find("h2,.title").first().text().trim()||"推荐";const items=$(block).find("a[href*='/vod/detail/id/']").toArray().map(a=>{const href=$(a).attr("href");const pic=$(a).find("img").attr("data-original")||$(a).find("img").attr("src")||"";const name=$(a).attr("title")||$(a).text().trim();const remark=$(a).find(".remarks,.score,.update").text().trim();return {id:base+href,name,pic,remark};}).filter(i=>i.name);return {title,videos:items};}).filter(c=>c.videos.length>0);return {type:"complex",data:[{type:"markdown",extra:{markdown:"欢迎使用 omofun 源\n> 域名变化时请修改 api"}},...cards]};
js.search: const base=env.get("baseUrl");const wd=env.get("keyword");const page=env.get("page")||1;const url=`${base}/vod/search.html?wd=${encodeURIComponent(wd)}&page=${page}`;const $=utils.kitty.load(await(0,utils.req)(url));const list=$(".search-list a,.module-item a,.hl-list-item a").toArray().map(a=>{const href=$(a).attr("href");const pic=$(a).find("img").attr("data-original")||$(a).find("img").attr("src")||"";const name=$(a).attr("title")||$(a).text().trim();const remark=$(a).find(".remarks").text().trim();return {id:base+href,name,pic,remark};}).filter(i=>i.name);return {list,page,pagecount:10};
js.detail: const base=env.get("baseUrl");const id=env.get("movieId");const url=base+id;const $=utils.kitty.load(await(0,utils.req)(url));const name=$("h1,.title").first().text().trim();const pic=$("img.cover,.module-item-pic img").attr("src")||"";const desc=$(".content,.desc,.blurb").text().trim().replace(/简介：/,'');const tabs=$(".hl-plays-from a,.module-tab a").toArray().map(a=>$(a).text().trim());const playlists=$(".hl-tabs-box,.episode-list").toArray().map(block=>{return $(block).find("a").toArray().map(a=>{const playHref=$(a).attr("href");const epName=$(a).text().trim();return `${epName}$${base+playHref}`;}).join("#");});const playlist=tabs.map((title,i)=>{return {title,videos:playlists[i]||""};});return {name,pic,desc,playlist};
